name: io.github.littlebearapps/outlook-mcp
description: MCP server for Microsoft Outlook via Graph API. 20 consolidated tools for email, calendar, contacts, folders, rules, categories, and settings with safety controls (dry-run preview, rate limiting, recipient allowlists) and MCP annotations on every tool.

environmentVariables.description: Azure AD application client secret value
environmentVariables.name: OUTLOOK_CLIENT_SECRET
